nasb.text: Paul called one of the centurions to him and said, “Lead this young man to the commander, for he has something to report to him.”

esv.text: Paul called one of the centurions and said, “Take this young man to the tribune, for he has something to tell him.”

cnv.text: 保羅請了一個百夫長來，說：“請你帶這個青年人去見千夫長，他有事要報告。”

ccb.text: 保罗请来一位百夫长，说：“请赶快带这青年去见千夫长，他有要事禀告！”

csbs.text: 保罗请来了一个百夫长，说：“请带这年轻人到千夫长那里，因为他有事要向他报告。”
